style.name: cobalt gilded ceremonial tarot
style.prompt: Original ceremonial tarot card in saturated cobalt and ultramarine blue with antique gold linework, never copying a named artwork or artist. Use the card brief to depict either a sacred human archetype or one dominant object-led emblem. Strong centered symmetry and reverent sacred pressure; a graceful profile, frontal figure or central symbol anchors the vertical axis. Dense gilded geometry surrounds the focal element: interlocked circles, pointed arches, radiating lines, celestial disks and botanical ornament cover the border and halo area, leaving no empty decorative field. Fine graceful ink line, flat jewel-colored planes and soft luminous shading; extremely detailed but controlled, never photorealistic or 3D. Every gold detail follows the symmetry; exact suit-object count is clearly visible. Vertical 2:3 full tarot card with blank title plaque. No readable words, pseudo-writing, logo, watermark, gold foil texture, heavy painterly brushwork, generic fantasy clutter, chibi, pin-up or animal protagonists.

pair_contract.reversed_reference: Reverse cards reuse the exact upright bitmap and rotate it 180 degrees in the runtime.
pair_contract.allowed_reversed_change: No alternate image is generated; orientation is represented by a 180-degree rotation.

role_translation.object_led: The named object is the protagonist. Keep it large, centered and unmistakable; human figures stay secondary when needed.
role_translation.anthropomorphic_roles: Use elegant human archetypes with expressive gaze, natural anatomy, role-specific clothing and symbolic tools. Animals are optional accents, never replacements.
role_translation.virtue_cards: Show abstract virtues through human gesture, posture, gaze, object relationships and environment.
role_translation.style_guardrail: Use cobalt-blue fields, antique-gold geometric ornament, strong centered symmetry and a sacred symbolic hierarchy. Do not reproduce a named deck, artist, film, studio or copyrighted character.

suit_object_contract.wands: Show the exact rank count of flowering wooden staffs as clearly readable primary suit symbols.
suit_object_contract.cups: Show the exact rank count of chalices as clearly readable primary suit symbols.
suit_object_contract.swords: Show the exact rank count of straight swords as clearly readable primary suit symbols.
suit_object_contract.pentacles: Show the exact rank count of golden pentacles as clearly readable primary suit symbols.

cards.shared_anchor: young traveler, white dog, cliff path, blue valley
cards.upright_scene: steps beyond a forest pass toward an open valley with a light bundle and curious joy
cards.reversed_transform: same traveler pauses at the cliff edge; dog pulls back, path partly hidden by mist, curiosity becomes carelessness

cards.shared_anchor: forest table, four suit objects, linking hand gesture
cards.upright_scene: focused maker links sky and earth above wand, cup, sword and jade disc on a moss table
cards.reversed_transform: same maker reaches for too many objects; one tool lies unused in shadow, skill becomes scattered intention

cards.shared_anchor: moon mirror, silk curtains, still water, seated keeper
cards.upright_scene: quiet keeper sits between pale and dark curtains before a moonlit water mirror, holding inner knowledge
cards.reversed_transform: same keeper turns the mirror away; reeds obscure reflection and silence becomes withheld information

cards.shared_anchor: flowering garden, grain, pomegranate, flowing water
cards.upright_scene: nurturing steward rests among fruit, grain and flowering trees beside a clear stream
cards.reversed_transform: same garden is overgrown and waterlogged; abundance becomes overgiving and neglected boundaries

cards.shared_anchor: stone seat, square seal, terraced hills, ordered pines
cards.upright_scene: grounded ruler sits on carved stone seat above ordered terraces, holding a square seal
cards.reversed_transform: same ruler grips seal too tightly; straight rows become rigid walls and authority becomes control

cards.shared_anchor: open courtyard, teacher, two students, ritual vessels
cards.upright_scene: teacher guides two students in an open forest courtyard with vessels and closed books
cards.reversed_transform: same lesson becomes unquestioned repetition; students look toward each other while teacher blocks the path

cards.shared_anchor: paired figures, flowering arch, bridge, paired birds
cards.upright_scene: two equal figures choose one another beneath intertwined flowering branches and a bright bridge
cards.reversed_transform: same pair stands on opposite sides of bridge; blossoms shed and shared choice becomes divided loyalty

cards.shared_anchor: lacquer chariot, black and white horses, banners, mountain road
cards.upright_scene: determined traveler guides lacquer chariot through windblown banners between two horses
cards.reversed_transform: same chariot pulls in two directions; banners knot around wheels and momentum loses direction

cards.shared_anchor: calm woman, guardian lion, silk ribbon, meadow
cards.upright_scene: calm figure guides powerful lion with silk ribbon, courage expressed through patience
cards.reversed_transform: same pair strains against ribbon; lion is restless and patience becomes suppressed force

cards.shared_anchor: solitary traveler, paper lantern, snowy ridge, hidden roofs
cards.upright_scene: lone traveler carries warm lantern across quiet ridge toward distant hidden roofs
cards.reversed_transform: same lantern is covered by traveler sleeve; ridge loops back and solitude becomes isolation

cards.shared_anchor: armillary wheel, four seasonal branches, changing clouds
cards.upright_scene: large armillary wheel turns above a valley where four seasonal branches meet
cards.reversed_transform: same wheel catches on broken branch; seasons repeat without movement and change feels stalled

cards.shared_anchor: balanced scales, upright sword, clear hall, straight light
cards.upright_scene: impartial figure holds balanced scales and straight sword in symmetrical open hall
cards.reversed_transform: same scales tip because one pan is hidden behind sleeve; truth becomes selective or delayed

cards.shared_anchor: flowering tree, suspended figure, stream, changed perspective
cards.upright_scene: contemplative figure hangs peacefully from flowering tree above slow stream
cards.reversed_transform: same figure clings rather than releases; stream moves on while pause becomes avoidance

cards.shared_anchor: dark robe, falling leaves, new plum blossoms, field path

cards.reversed_transform: same path is blocked by heap of leaves; blossoms remain unopened and transformation is resisted

cards.shared_anchor: two porcelain vessels, stream, stone, measured water
cards.upright_scene: graceful figure pours water between porcelain vessels with one foot on stone and one in stream
cards.reversed_transform: same vessels overflow because stream is turbulent; integration becomes excess and poor pacing

cards.shared_anchor: shadow pavilion, loose ribbons, two figures, lavish fruit
cards.upright_scene: two people stand loosely bound by ribbons in lush shadow-market pavilion, able to leave
cards.reversed_transform: same ribbons tighten around wrists and gate disappears behind curtains; attachment becomes denial

cards.shared_anchor: watchtower, lightning, open roof, falling fragments
cards.upright_scene: white lightning opens high watchtower as bright fragments fall into storm clouds
cards.reversed_transform: same tower remains standing but door is sealed and smoke fills windows; collapse becomes delayed warning

cards.shared_anchor: lotus pool, two vessels, star map, quiet figure
cards.upright_scene: calm figure pours water beside lotus pool while star map glows across violet-blue sky
cards.reversed_transform: same figure pours into dry basin under clouded star map; hope becomes depleted or disconnected

cards.shared_anchor: moon opening, two animals, winding path, reflected water
cards.upright_scene: pale moon opening watches winding path between pale dog, dark hound and quiet water
cards.reversed_transform: same animals face wrong direction and reflection breaks into ripples; intuition becomes projection

cards.shared_anchor: child, warm sun disc, cinnabar gate, flower garden

cards.reversed_transform: same child turns away from gate as sun slips behind thin cloud; vitality becomes delayed joy

cards.shared_anchor: bronze bell, rising figures, dawn mountains, returning birds

cards.reversed_transform: same figures cover ears while bell is distant in fog; reflection becomes self-judgement or refusal

cards.shared_anchor: silk ring, dancing figure, four seasonal corners, complete valley

cards.reversed_transform: same ring is tied at one side and one seasonal corner is missing; completion becomes unfinished closure

cards.shared_anchor: generous merchant, scales, grain, two recipients

cards.shared_anchor: focused artisan, workbench, eight jade discs

cards.shared_anchor: independent woman, nine discs, rich garden, bird

cards.shared_anchor: three generations, courtyard, ten jade discs

cards.shared_anchor: young student, jade disc, bright field

cards.shared_anchor: steady rider, jade disc, cultivated land

cards.shared_anchor: prosperous leader, jade disc, garden pavilion
